name: schwab-mcp
description: Charles Schwab — per-user account data (quotes, accounts, positions, balances). Owner-only ACL; tokens stored encrypted in the broker. Auto-prompts for re-auth at session start when the token is stale.

mcpKey.title: MCP bearer token
mcpKey.description: MCP bearer token for this service (managed by `cass refresh-keys`).

hooks.command: bash -c 'command -v cass >/dev/null 2>&1 && cass auth status --service schwab --if-needed --quiet || true'
